title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Tata Elxsi

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Tata Elxsi
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Elxsi:
Tata Elxsi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi!
